overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a bearded warrior rowing a wooden boat through turquoise coastal waters toward a rocky sea cave. The scene transitions from bright open sky to the shadowy interior of a stalactite-filled cave system.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal approach to sea cave entrance

agents.ego_description: rowing the boat steadily toward the dark cave entrance between rocky cliffs

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered stone formations
tall rocky cliff face with primitive thatched huts on top
dark arched opening in the rock face leading into the cave system
icicle-like rock formations hanging from the cave entrance ceiling
primitive straw-roofed structures perched atop the right cliff
small wooden rowboat with carved dragon head prow

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous approach toward a sea cave entrance in bright midday sunlight. The camera follows a wooden boat from behind as it moves through turquoise water toward a dark cave mouth flanked by rocky cliffs. Primitive thatched huts are visible atop the right cliff, and stalactites hang from the cave entrance.

events.description: boat passes from open water into the dark cave mouth
lighting shifts from bright sunlight to shadowy cave interior with backlight from entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing to row deeper into the cave system, navigating the narrow water passage

entered.detail: rough rocky walls of the cave interior closing in on the left side
rough rocky walls of the cave interior closing in on the right side
small white birds floating on the water surface inside the cave

segments.scene_description: The boat enters the dark cave mouth, transitioning from bright sunlight to a shadowy interior lit by backlight from the entrance. The space becomes narrow and enclosed with rocky walls on both sides and stalactites hanging from the ceiling. White birds float on the water ahead as the boat rows deeper into the cave system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open coastal expanse into the shadowy depths of a rocky sea cave. It begins by following a wooden boat from behind as it glides through turquoise water under midday sunlight toward a dark cave mouth flanked by cliffs topped with primitive thatched huts. As the boat reaches the entrance, the scene shifts from the brilliant exterior light to a dim, enclosed interior where stalactites hang from the ceiling and rocky walls press in from both sides. The camera then moves deeper into the narrowing cave system, transitioning into a backlit environment where white birds float on the water ahead.
